title: Even More Mob Variants (BTA)
description: Adds more Mob Variants to "Better Than Adventure!".
body:
This is a Texture Pack, designed for "[Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)", that adds Mob Variations.

# VARIANTS
- Ghast
- Zombie Pigman
- Sheep
- Slime
- Squid
- Wolf

# CREDITS

Textures from:

- RESOURCE PACK: "[Extra Mob Variants](https://discord.com/channels/866992171319558144/1279938499704914032)", by sx22. (Discord tag)
- RESOURCE PACK: "[Better Than Ghasts!](https://discord.com/channels/866992171319558144/1326939543693299782)", by sx22. & schlokanov (Discord tags)
- RESOURCE PACK: "[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)" / "[Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)"
- The rest either comes from Mojang Studios or was made by me, AndreWharn.

Extra:

- "pack.png" made by AndreWharn.
- No copyright infringments are intended, please contact me on Discord immediately if there's something wrong: https://andrewharn.carrd.co

# Thanks for using this pack! :D
